io.minio.messages

Class Checksum

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.minio.messages.Checksum
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CompleteMultipartUploadResult, CopyObjectResult, Part

    public class Checksum
extends Object
    Object checksum information.
